title: Homepage loads with profile summary and navigation
description: Verify that a visitor can open the homepage, see Saran’s introductory profile content, and access the main navigation across the site.

steps.description: Verify Saran’s profile summary content is visible
Verify the main navigation is visible

title: Homepage shows Saran's professional snapshot
description: Verifies that the homepage loads Saran's profile introduction, metrics, and primary entry points to the portfolio.

steps.description: Verify Saran's profile introduction is visible
Verify portfolio navigation actions are available

title: Sticky navigation remains usable while browsing sections
description: Verify that a visitor can move between major portfolio sections from the header and continue navigating without losing access to the menu.

steps.description: Click the link to open the about page
Click the link to open the experience page
Click the link to open the projects page
Verify the projects section is displayed
Verify the main navigation is still visible

title: Sticky navigation opens the About page from the homepage
description: Verifies that the header navigation can move from the homepage to About and load the about content.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for the about page
Verify the about page content is displayed
Verify the active navigation state reflects the about page

title: Header navigation updates active section across portfolio pages
description: Verify that a visitor can start on one section and use the header to move through the portfolio while the current section remains clearly indicated.

steps.description: Click the link to open the experience page
Click the link to open the publications page
Click the link to open the contact page
Verify the contact page is displayed
Verify the active navigation state reflects the current section

title: Sticky navigation moves from About to Experience
description: Verifies that the header navigation works from About and loads the experience timeline.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for the experience page
Verify the experience timeline is displayed
Verify the active navigation state reflects the experience page

title: Homepage directs visitors to the projects showcase
description: Verifies that a visitor can move from the homepage hero to the projects section and see the projects content load.

steps.description: Click the action that opens the projects section
Verify the projects showcase is displayed
Verify project descriptions and tech stack details are visible

title: Homepage CTA opens the projects section
description: Verify that a visitor can use the homepage project call to action to reach the projects showcase and see project content.

steps.description: Click the homepage action that opens the projects section
Verify the projects showcase is displayed

title: See contact details and outbound links
description: A visitor can open the contact page and review the contact details and external contact actions.

steps.description: Verify email and social contact links are visible

title: Sticky navigation moves from Projects to Contact
description: Verifies that a visitor can navigate from Projects to Contact and see the contact details load.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for the contact page
Verify the contact details are displayed
Verify the active navigation state reflects the contact page

title: Experience page shows timeline entries
description: Verify that a visitor can open the experience page and read the company, role, and timeline history.

steps.description: Verify company and role details are visible

title: Homepage directs visitors to the experience section
description: Verifies that a visitor can move from the homepage hero to the experience page and see the work timeline load.

steps.description: Click the action that opens the experience section
Verify the experience timeline is displayed
Verify work and internship details are visible

title: About page displays background and skills content
description: Verify that a visitor can open the about page and read the background, education, and skills information.

steps.description: Verify education and skills content is visible

title: Open contact page from another portfolio section
description: A visitor can move to the contact page from within the portfolio and confirm the contact section loads fully.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the contact page
Verify the contact actions are visible

title: About page presents background, education, and skills
description: Verifies that the About page loads the expected personal background, education, and skills content.

steps.description: Verify personal background details are visible

title: Projects page shows descriptions and technology stacks
description: Verify that a visitor can open the projects page and review project descriptions together with their technology stacks.

steps.description: Verify project descriptions and technology stacks are visible

title: View achievements cards and recognition details
description: A visitor can open the achievements page and review the accomplishment cards with their descriptions.

steps.description: Verify award and recognition details are visible

title: Sticky navigation returns from Gallery to Home
description: Verifies that the header navigation can return from Gallery to the homepage and restore the hero section.

steps.description: Click the navigation item for the home page
Verify the homepage hero is displayed
Verify the active navigation state reflects the home page

title: Publications page shows paper titles and abstracts
description: Verify that a visitor can open the publications page and read publication titles and abstracts.

steps.description: Verify the publications list is displayed
Verify publication titles and abstracts are visible

title: Reach achievements from another section and preserve navigation
description: A visitor can move to the achievements page from another portfolio section and still access the sticky navigation afterward.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the achievements page

title: Browse gallery images and captions
description: A visitor can open the gallery page and view the image showcase with its captions.

title: Homepage directs visitors to the gallery
description: Verifies that a visitor can move from the homepage hero to the gallery and see project images and captions load.

steps.description: Click the action that opens the gallery section
Verify images and captions are visible

title: Contact page shows contact details and outbound links
description: Verify that a visitor can open the contact page and access the visible contact details and outbound contact actions.

steps.description: Verify outbound contact links are visible

title: Review achievement cards after browsing the portfolio
description: A visitor can move from the projects area into achievements and confirm the accomplishments section loads correctly.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the achievements page
Verify certifications or recognition details are visible

title: Launch email and social contact actions
description: A visitor can use the contact page links to start an email action and open a social profile action.

steps.description: Verify the contact actions are available on the page

title: Homepage directs visitors to the publications section
description: Verifies that a visitor can move from the homepage hero to the publications page and see paper listings load.

steps.description: Click the action that opens the publications section
Verify the publications listing is displayed
Verify publication titles and abstracts are visible

title: Achievements page shows accomplishment cards
description: Verify that a visitor can open the achievements page and see the listed awards, certifications, or achievements.

title: Move to gallery from the homepage and continue browsing
description: A visitor can jump from the homepage into the gallery and confirm the visual showcase loads correctly.

steps.description: Click the homepage link to the gallery
Verify captions for the showcased images are visible

title: Gallery page renders images and captions
description: Verify that a visitor can open the gallery page and see the project images with their captions.

title: View gallery content after visiting another section
description: A visitor can navigate to the gallery from a different section and still see the full image presentation.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the gallery page

title: Homepage résumé action reflects the documented limitation
description: Verifies that the résumé download action on the homepage does not produce an actual file download as documented.

steps.description: Verify the homepage remains usable after the action

title: Resume action matches the documented limitation
description: Verify that the homepage résumé action is available and does not produce a downloadable file, matching the documented limitation.

steps.description: Verify the résumé action is available
Verify no file download is initiated
